title: Melted Irish Cheese Lasagna
description: A kid-friendly Irish dish featuring a blend of cheeses and sesame seeds, cooked to perfection using sous-vide techniques.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide water bath to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions, then set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded irish cheddar cheese, mozzarella cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a separate bowl, mix the sour cream and diced onion.
In a large sous-vide bag, create a thin layer of the cheese mixture, followed by a layer of noodles, and then a layer of the sour cream mixture.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients have been used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Seal the sous-vide bag and cook for 2 hours.
Remove the lasagna from the bag and top with toasted sesame seeds.
